verses.latin_vulgate: Juraverunt quoque filii Israël in Maspha, et dixerunt : Nullus nostrum dabit filiis Benjamin de filiabus suis uxorem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִ֣ישׁ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל נִשְׁבַּ֥ע בַּמִּצְפָּ֖ה לֵאמֹ֑ר אִ֣ישׁ מִמֶּ֔נּוּ לֹא־יִתֵּ֥ן בִּתּ֛וֹ לְבִנְיָמִ֖ן לְאִשָּֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now the children of Israel had also sworn in Maspha, saying: None of us shall give of his daughters to the children of Benjamin to wife.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israelin miehet olivat vannoneet Mitspassa ja sanoneet: ei yksikään meistä pidä tytärtänsä antaman BenJaminilaisille emännäksi.
verses.king_james: Now the men of Israel had sworn in Mizpeh, saying, There shall not any of us give his daughter unto Benjamin to wife.

verses.latin_vulgate: Veneruntque omnes ad domum Dei in Silo, et in conspectu ejus sedentes usque ad vesperam, levaverunt vocem, et magno ululatu cœperunt flere, dicentes :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֤א הָעָם֙ בֵּֽית־אֵ֔ל וַיֵּ֤שְׁבוּ שָׁם֙ עַד־הָעֶ֔רֶב לִפְנֵ֖י הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וַיִּשְׂא֣וּ קוֹלָ֔ם וַיִּבְכּ֖וּ בְּכִ֥י גָדֽוֹל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they all came to the house of God in Silo, and sitting before him till the evening, lifted up their voices, and began to lament and weep, saying:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kansa tuli Jumalan huoneesen ja oli siellä Jumalan edessä ehtoosen asti; ja he korottivat äänensä ja itkivät katkerasti,
verses.king_james: And the people came to the house of God, and abode there till even before God, and lifted up their voices, and wept sore;

verses.latin_vulgate: Quare, Domine Deus Israël, factum est hoc malum in populo tuo, ut hodie una tribus auferretur ex nobis ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמְר֔וּ לָמָ֗ה יְהֹוָה֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל הָ֥יְתָה זֹּ֖את בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל לְהִפָּקֵ֥ד הַיּ֛וֹם מִיִּשְׂרָאֵ֖ל שֵׁ֥בֶט אֶחָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: O Lord God of Israel, why is so great an evil come to pass in thy people, that this day one tribe should be taken away from among us?
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoivat: O Herra Israelin Jumala, miksi tämä tapahtui Israelissa, että tänäpänä on yksi sukukunta Israelista vähentynyt?
verses.king_james: And said, O Lord God of Israel, why is this come to pass in Israel, that there should be to day one tribe lacking in Israel?

verses.latin_vulgate: Altera autem die diluculo consurgentes, exstruxerunt altare : obtuleruntque ibi holocausta, et pacificas victimas, et dixerunt :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיְהִי֙ מִֽמׇּחֳרָ֔ת וַיַּשְׁכִּ֣ימוּ הָעָ֔ם וַיִּבְנוּ־שָׁ֖ם מִזְבֵּ֑חַ וַיַּעֲל֥וּ עֹל֖וֹת וּשְׁלָמִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And rising early the next day, they built an altar: and offered there holocausts, and victims of peace, and they said:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja toisena päivänä nousi kansa varhain ja rakensi siihen alttarin, ja uhrasi polttouhria ja kiitosuhria.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass on the morrow, that the people rose early, and built there an altar, and offered burnt offerings and peace offerings.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis non ascendit in exercitu Domini de universis tribubus Israël ? grandi enim juramento se constrinxerant, cum essent in Maspha, interfici eos qui defuissent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּֽאמְרוּ֙ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל מִ֠י אֲשֶׁ֨ר לֹא־עָלָ֧ה בַקָּהָ֛ל מִכׇּל־שִׁבְטֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל אֶל־יְהֹוָ֑ה כִּי֩ הַשְּׁבוּעָ֨ה הַגְּדוֹלָ֜ה הָיְתָ֗ה לַ֠אֲשֶׁ֠ר לֹא־עָלָ֨ה אֶל־יְהֹוָ֧ה הַמִּצְפָּ֛ה לֵאמֹ֖ר מ֥וֹת יוּמָֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who is there among all the tribes of Israel that came not up with the army of the Lord? for they had bound themselves with a great oath, when they were in Maspha, that whosoever were wanting should be slain.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israelin lapset sanoivat: kuka on kaikista Israelin sukukunnista, joka ei tänne ole tullut kansan kanssa Herran eteen? Sillä suuri vala oli tehty, että se joka ei tullut Herran tykö Mitspaan, hänen piti totisesti kuoleman.
verses.king_james: And the children of Israel said, Who is there among all the tribes of Israel that came not up with the congregation unto the Lord? For they had made a great oath concerning him that came not up to the Lord to Mizpeh, saying, He shall surely be put to death.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ductique pœnitentia filii Israël super fratre suo Benjamin, cœperunt dicere : Ablata est tribus una de Israël :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּנָּֽחֲמוּ֙ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֶל־בִּנְיָמִ֖ן אָחִ֑יו וַיֹּ֣אמְר֔וּ נִגְדַּ֥ע הַיּ֛וֹם שֵׁ֥בֶט אֶחָ֖ד מִיִּשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the children of Israel being moved with repentance for their brother Benjamin, began to say: One tribe is taken away from Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Israelin lapset katuivat veljensä BenJaminin tähden ja sanoivat: tänäpänä on yksi sukukunta Israelista hävitetty.
verses.king_james: And the children of Israel repented them for Benjamin their brother, and said, There is one tribe cut off from Israel this day.

verses.latin_vulgate: unde uxores accipient ? omnes enim in commune juravimus, non daturos nos his filias nostras.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַה־נַּעֲשֶׂ֥ה לָהֶ֛ם לַנּוֹתָרִ֖ים לְנָשִׁ֑ים וַאֲנַ֙חְנוּ֙ נִשְׁבַּ֣עְנוּ בַֽיהֹוָ֔ה לְבִלְתִּ֛י תֵּת־לָהֶ֥ם מִבְּנוֹתֵ֖ינוּ לְנָשִֽׁים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Whence shall they take wives? For we have all in general sworn, not to give our daughters to them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuinka me käytämme itsemme heidän kanssansa, että jääneet saisivat emäntiä? sillä me olemme vannoneet Herran kautta, ettemme anna heille emäntiä meidän tyttäristämme.
verses.king_james: How shall we do for wives for them that remain, seeing we have sworn by the Lord that we will not give them of our daughters to wives?

verses.latin_vulgate: Idcirco dixerunt : Quis est de universis tribubus Israël, qui non ascendit ad Dominum in Maspha ? Et ecce inventi sunt habitatores Jabes Galaad in illo exercitu non fuisse.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמְר֔וּ מִ֗י אֶחָד֙ מִשִּׁבְטֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל אֲשֶׁ֛ר לֹא־עָלָ֥ה אֶל־יְהֹוָ֖ה הַמִּצְפָּ֑ה וְ֠הִנֵּ֠ה לֹ֣א בָא־אִ֧ישׁ אֶל־הַֽמַּחֲנֶ֛ה מִיָּבֵ֥ישׁ גִּלְעָ֖ד אֶל־הַקָּהָֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore they said: Who is there of all the tribes of Israel, that came not up to the Lord to Maspha? And, behold, the inhabitants of Jabes Galaad were found not to have been in that army.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he sanoivat: kuka on Israelin sukukunnassa, joka ei ole tänne tullut Herran tykö Mitspaan? ja katso, ei ole yksikään ollut leirissä kansan seassa Jabeksesta Gileadissa.
verses.king_james: And they said, What one is there of the tribes of Israel that came not up to Mizpeh to the Lord? And, behold, there came none to the camp from Jabesh–gilead to the assembly.

verses.latin_vulgate: (Eo quoque tempore cum essent in Silo, nullus ex eis ibi repertus est.)
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְפָּקֵ֖ד הָעָ֑ם וְהִנֵּ֤ה אֵֽין־שָׁם֙ אִ֔ישׁ מִיּוֹשְׁבֵ֖י יָבֵ֥שׁ גִּלְעָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: (At that time also when they were in Silo, no one of them was found there,)
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kansa luettiin: ja katso, ei ollut siellä yhtäkään Jabeksen asuvaa Gileadista.
verses.king_james: For the people were numbered, and, behold, there were none of the inhabitants of Jabesh–gilead there.

verses.latin_vulgate: Miserunt itaque decem millia viros robustissimos, et præceperunt eis : Ite, et percutite habitatores Jabes Galaad in ore gladii, tam uxores quam parvulos eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁלְחוּ־שָׁ֣ם הָעֵדָ֗ה שְׁנֵים־עָשָׂ֥ר אֶ֛לֶף אִ֖ישׁ מִבְּנֵ֣י הֶחָ֑יִל וַיְצַוּ֨וּ אוֹתָ֜ם לֵאמֹ֗ר לְ֠כ֠וּ וְהִכִּיתֶ֞ם אֶת־יוֹשְׁבֵ֨י יָבֵ֤שׁ גִּלְעָד֙ לְפִי־חֶ֔רֶב וְהַנָּשִׁ֖ים וְהַטָּֽף׃
verses.douay_rheims: So they sent ten thousand of the most valiant men, and commanded them, saying: Go and put the inhabitants of Jabes Galaad to the sword, with their wives and their children.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin he lähettivät sinne kansasta kaksitoistakymmentä tuhatta sotamiestä ja käskivät heitä, sanoen: menkäät ja lyökäät Jabeksen asuvaiset Gileadissa miekan terällä vaimoinensa ja lapsinensa.
verses.king_james: And the congregation sent thither twelve thousand men of the valiantest, and commanded them, saying, Go and smite the inhabitants of Jabesh–gilead with the edge of the sword, with the women and the children.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et hoc erit quod observare debebitis : omne generis masculini, et mulieres quæ cognoverunt viros, interficite ; virgines autem reservate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְזֶ֥ה הַדָּבָ֖ר אֲשֶׁ֣ר תַּעֲשׂ֑וּ כׇּל־זָכָ֗ר וְכׇל־אִשָּׁ֛ה יֹדַ֥עַת מִשְׁכַּב־זָכָ֖ר תַּחֲרִֽימוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And this is what you shall observe: Every male, and all women that have known men, you shall kill, but the virgins you shall save.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta näin pitää teidän tekemän: kaiken miehenpuolen ja kaikki vaimot, jotka miesten kanssa ovat maanneet, pitää teidän tappaman.
verses.king_james: And this is the thing that ye shall do, Ye shall utterly destroy every male, and every woman that hath lain by man.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inventæque sunt de Jabes Galaad quadringentæ virgines, quæ nescierunt viri thorum : et adduxerunt eas ad castra in Silo, in terram Chanaan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּמְצְא֞וּ מִיּוֹשְׁבֵ֣י ׀ יָבֵ֣ישׁ גִּלְעָ֗ד אַרְבַּ֤ע מֵאוֹת֙ נַעֲרָ֣ה בְתוּלָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֧ר לֹא־יָדְעָ֛ה אִ֖ישׁ לְמִשְׁכַּ֣ב זָכָ֑ר וַיָּבִ֨אוּ אוֹתָ֤ם אֶל־הַֽמַּחֲנֶה֙ שִׁלֹ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֖ר בְּאֶ֥רֶץ כְּנָֽעַן׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And there were found of Jabes Galaad four hundred virgins, that had not known the bed of a man, and they brought them to the camp in Silo, into the land of Chanaan.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he löysivät Jabeksen asuvaisista Gileadissa neljäsataa piikaa, jotka neitseet olivat ja ei olleet yhdenkään miehen tykönä maanneet, ne he veivät Silon leiriin, joka on Kanaanin maassa.
verses.king_james: And they found among the inhabitants of Jabesh–gilead four hundred young virgins, that had known no man by lying with any male: and they brought them unto the camp to Shiloh, which is in the land of Canaan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Miseruntque nuntios ad filios Benjamin, qui erant in petra Remmon, et præceperunt eis, ut eos susciperent in pace.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּשְׁלְחוּ֙ כׇּל־הָ֣עֵדָ֔ה וַֽיְדַבְּרוּ֙ אֶל־בְּנֵ֣י בִנְיָמִ֔ן אֲשֶׁ֖ר בְּסֶ֣לַע רִמּ֑וֹן וַיִּקְרְא֥וּ לָהֶ֖ם שָׁלֽוֹם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they sent messengers to the children of Benjamin, that were in the rock Remmon, and commanded them to receive them in peace.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin koko kansa lähetti matkaan ja käski sanoa BenJaminin lapsille, jotka olivat Rimmonin kalliolla, ja kutsuivat heitä ystävällisesti.
verses.king_james: And the whole congregation sent some to speak to the children of Benjamin that were in the rock Rimmon, and to call peaceably unto them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Veneruntque filii Benjamin in illo tempore, et datæ sunt eis uxores de filiabus Jabes Galaad : alias autem non repererunt, quas simili modo traderent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֤שׇׁב בִּנְיָמִן֙ בָּעֵ֣ת הַהִ֔יא וַיִּתְּנ֤וּ לָהֶם֙ הַנָּשִׁ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר חִיּ֔וּ מִנְּשֵׁ֖י יָבֵ֣שׁ גִּלְעָ֑ד וְלֹא־מָצְא֥וּ לָהֶ֖ם כֵּֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the children of Benjamin came at that time, and wives were given them of Jabes Galaad: but they found no others, whom they might give in like manner.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja BenJaminin lapset tulivat silloin jälleen, ja he antoivat heille emäntiä niistä jotka he olivat jättäneet elämään Jabeksen vaimoista Gileadissa; ja ei niinkään heille täytynyt.
verses.king_james: And Benjamin came again at that time; and they gave them wives which they had saved alive of the women of Jabesh–gilead: and yet so they sufficed them not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Universusque Israël valde doluit, et egit pœnitentiam super interfectione unius tribus ex Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָעָ֥ם נִחָ֖ם לְבִנְיָמִ֑ן כִּֽי־עָשָׂ֧ה יְהֹוָ֛ה פֶּ֖רֶץ בְּשִׁבְטֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all Israel was very sorry, and repented for the destroying of one tribe out of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin kansa katui BenJaminin tähden, että Herra oli loven tehnyt Israelin sukukunnissa.
verses.king_james: And the people repented them for Benjamin, because that the Lord had made a breach in the tribes of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixeruntque majores natu : Quid faciemus reliquis, qui non acceperunt uxores ? omnes in Benjamin feminæ conciderunt,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּֽאמְרוּ֙ זִקְנֵ֣י הָֽעֵדָ֔ה מַה־נַּעֲשֶׂ֥ה לַנּוֹתָרִ֖ים לְנָשִׁ֑ים כִּֽי־נִשְׁמְדָ֥ה מִבִּנְיָמִ֖ן אִשָּֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the ancients said: What shall we do with the rest, that have not received wives? for all the women in Benjamin are dead.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kansan vanhimmat sanoivat: kuinka me teemme, että jääneet saisivat myös emäntiä? sillä vaimoväki BenJaminissa on hukutettu.
verses.king_james: Then the elders of the congregation said, How shall we do for wives for them that remain, seeing the women are destroyed out of Benjamin?

verses.latin_vulgate: et magna nobis cura, ingentique studio providendum est, ne una tribus deleatur ex Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמְר֔וּ יְרֻשַּׁ֥ת פְּלֵיטָ֖ה לְבִנְיָמִ֑ן וְלֹא־יִמָּחֶ֥ה שֵׁ֖בֶט מִיִּשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And we must use all care, and provide with great diligence, that one tribe be not destroyed out of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoivat: niiden pitää kuitenkin nautitseman perimisensä, jotka jääneet ovat BenJaminista, ettei yksikään sukukunta Israelista hävitettäisi,
verses.king_james: And they said, There must be an inheritance for them that be escaped of Benjamin, that a tribe be not destroyed out of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filias enim nostras eis dare non possumus, constricti juramento et maledictione qua diximus : Maledictus qui dederit de filiabus suis uxorem Benjamin.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲנַ֗חְנוּ לֹ֥א נוּכַ֛ל לָתֵת־לָהֶ֥ם נָשִׁ֖ים מִבְּנוֹתֵ֑ינוּ כִּֽי־נִשְׁבְּע֤וּ בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר אָר֕וּר נֹתֵ֥ן אִשָּׁ֖ה לְבִנְיָמִֽן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: For as to our own daughters we cannot give them, being bound with an oath and a curse, whereby we said: Cursed be he that shall give Benjamin any of his daughters to wife.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja emme taida antaa heille meidän tyttäriämme emänniksi; sillä Israelin lapset ovat vannoneet ja sanoneet: kirottu olkoon se, joka BenJaminilaisille emännän antaa.
verses.king_james: Howbeit we may not give them wives of our daughters: for the children of Israel have sworn, saying, Cursed be he that giveth a wife to Benjamin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ceperuntque consilium, atque dixerunt : Ecce solemnitas Domini est in Silo anniversaria, quæ sita est ad septentrionem urbis Bethel, et ad orientalem plagam viæ, quæ de Bethel tendit ad Sichimam, et ad meridiem oppidi Lebona.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּאמְר֡וּ הִנֵּה֩ חַג־יְהֹוָ֨ה בְּשִׁל֜וֹ מִיָּמִ֣ים ׀ יָמִ֗ימָה אֲשֶׁ֞ר מִצְּפ֤וֹנָה לְבֵֽית־אֵל֙ מִזְרְחָ֣ה הַשֶּׁ֔מֶשׁ לִ֨מְסִלָּ֔ה הָעֹלָ֥ה מִבֵּֽית־אֵ֖ל שְׁכֶ֑מָה וּמִנֶּ֖גֶב לִלְבוֹנָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: So they took counsel, and said: Behold, there is a yearly solemnity of the Lord in Silo, which is situate on the north of the city of Bethel, and on the east side of the way, that goeth from Bethel to Sichem, and on the south of the town of Lebona.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he sanoivat: katso, Herran jokavuotinen juhlapäivä on Silossa, joka on BetElistä pohjoiseen päin, auringon nousuun päin siitä tiestä, joka menee BetElistä Sikemiin, ja länteen päin Lebonasta.
verses.king_james: Then they said, Behold, there is a feast of the Lord in Shiloh yearly in a place which is on the north side of Beth–el, on the east side of the highway that goeth up from Beth–el to Shechem, and on the south of Lebonah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præceperuntque filiis Benjamin, atque dixerunt : Ite, et latitate in vineis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (ויצו) [וַיְצַוּ֕וּ] אֶת־בְּנֵ֥י בִנְיָמִ֖ן לֵאמֹ֑ר לְכ֖וּ וַאֲרַבְתֶּ֥ם בַּכְּרָמִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they commanded the children of Benjamin and said: Go, and lie hid in the vineyards,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he käskivät BenJaminin lapsille ja sanoivat: menkäät ja väijykäät viinamäissä.
verses.king_james: Therefore they commanded the children of Benjamin, saying, Go and lie in wait in the vineyards;

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque videritis filias Silo ad ducendos choros ex more procedere, exite repente de vineis, et rapite ex eis singuli uxores singulas, et pergite in terram Benjamin.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּרְאִיתֶ֗ם וְ֠הִנֵּ֠ה אִם־יֵ֨צְא֥וּ בְנוֹת־שִׁילוֹ֮ לָח֣וּל בַּמְּחֹלוֹת֒ וִֽיצָאתֶם֙ מִן־הַכְּרָמִ֔ים וַחֲטַפְתֶּ֥ם לָכֶ֛ם אִ֥ישׁ אִשְׁתּ֖וֹ מִבְּנ֣וֹת שִׁיל֑וֹ וַהֲלַכְתֶּ֖ם אֶ֥רֶץ בִּנְיָמִֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when you shall see the daughters of Silo come out, as the custom is, to dance, come ye on a sudden out of the vineyards, and catch you every man his wife among them, and go into the land of Benjamin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin näette Silon tyttäret käyvän ulos hyppyyn, niin juoskaat kiiruusti viinamäistä, ja ottakaat jokainen teillenne Silon tyttäristä emännän, ja menkäät BenJaminin maalle.
verses.king_james: And see, and, behold, if the daughters of Shiloh come out to dance in dances, then come ye out of the vineyards, and catch you every man his wife of the daughters of Shiloh, and go to the land of Benjamin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque venerint patres earum, ac fratres, et adversum vos queri cœperint atque jurgari, dicemus eis : Miseremini eorum : non enim rapuerunt eas jure bellantium atque victorum : sed rogantibus ut acciperent, non dedistis, et a vestra parte peccatum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֡ה כִּֽי־יָבֹ֣אוּ אֲבוֹתָם֩ א֨וֹ אֲחֵיהֶ֜ם (לרוב) [לָרִ֣יב ׀] אֵלֵ֗ינוּ וְאָמַ֤רְנוּ אֲלֵיהֶם֙ חׇנּ֣וּנוּ אוֹתָ֔ם כִּ֣י לֹ֥א לָקַ֛חְנוּ אִ֥ישׁ אִשְׁתּ֖וֹ בַּמִּלְחָמָ֑ה כִּ֣י לֹ֥א אַתֶּ֛ם נְתַתֶּ֥ם לָהֶ֖ם כָּעֵ֥ת תֶּאְשָֽׁמוּ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And when their fathers and their brethren shall come, and shall begin to complain against you, and to chide, we will say to them: Have pity on them: for they took them not away as by the right of war or conquest, but when they asked to have them, you gave them not, and the fault was committed on your part.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin heidän isänsä taikka veljensä tulevat valittamaan meidän eteemme, niin me sanomme heille: olkaat heille armiaat, sillä emme ole ottaneet heille emäntää sodalla; mutta ette tahtoneet heille antaa: tämä on teidän syynne.
verses.king_james: And it shall be, when their fathers or their brethren come unto us to complain, that we will say unto them, Be favourable unto them for our sakes: because we reserved not to each man his wife in the war: for ye did not give unto them at this time, that ye should be guilty.

verses.latin_vulgate: Feceruntque filii Benjamin ut sibi fuerat imperatum : et juxta numerum suum, rapuerunt sibi de his quæ ducebant choros, uxores singulas : abieruntque in possessionem suam ædificantes urbes, et habitantes in eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּֽעֲשׂוּ־כֵן֙ בְּנֵ֣י בִנְיָמִ֔ן וַיִּשְׂא֤וּ נָשִׁים֙ לְמִסְפָּרָ֔ם מִן־הַמְּחֹלְל֖וֹת אֲשֶׁ֣ר גָּזָ֑לוּ וַיֵּלְכ֗וּ וַיָּשׁ֙וּבוּ֙ אֶל־נַ֣חֲלָתָ֔ם וַיִּבְנוּ֙ אֶת־הֶ֣עָרִ֔ים וַיֵּשְׁב֖וּ בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the children of Benjamin did as they had been commanded: and, according to their number, they carried off for themselves every man his wife of them that were dancing: and they went into their possession, and built up their cities, and dwelt in them.
verses.finnish_biblia: BenJaminin lapset tekivät niin ja ottivat hypyistä lukunsa jälkeen vaimot ryövyydellä, ja menivät pois ja asuivat perinnössänsä, rakensivat kaupungeita ja asuivat niissä.
verses.king_james: And the children of Benjamin did so, and took them wives, according to their number, of them that danced, whom they caught: and they went and returned unto their inheritance, and repaired the cities, and dwelt in them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii quoque Israël reversi sunt per tribus et familias in tabernacula sua. In diebus illis non erat rex in Israël : sed unusquisque quod sibi rectum videbatur, hoc faciebat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְהַלְּכ֨וּ מִשָּׁ֤ם בְּנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ בָּעֵ֣ת הַהִ֔יא אִ֥ישׁ לְשִׁבְט֖וֹ וּלְמִשְׁפַּחְתּ֑וֹ וַיֵּצְא֣וּ מִשָּׁ֔ם אִ֖ישׁ לְנַחֲלָתֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The children of Israel also returned by their tribes, and families, to their dwellings. In those days there was no king in Israel: but every one did that which seemed right to himself.
verses.finnish_biblia: Israelin lapset menivät myös sieltä pois silloin, itsekukin sukukuntansa ja lankoutensa tykö, ja menivät sieltä itsekukin perimiseensä.
verses.king_james: And the children of Israel departed thence at that time, every man to his tribe and to his family, and they went out from thence every man to his inheritance.

verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּיָּמִ֣ים הָהֵ֔ם אֵ֥ין מֶ֖לֶךְ בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל אִ֛ישׁ הַיָּשָׁ֥ר בְּעֵינָ֖יו יַעֲשֶֽׂה׃
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin ei ollut kuningasta Israelissa, vaan jokainen teki niinkuin hänelle näkyi oikein olevan.
verses.king_james: In those days there was no king in Israel: every man did that which was right in his own eyes.
